headline: **MLB Daily Roundup: April 22, 2026**
article:
The Houston Astros' winning streak came to an end with an 8-5 loss to the Cleveland Guardians. The Guardians' Angel Martínez led the offense with 2 hits, including a home run, and 1 RBI. Meanwhile, the Cincinnati Reds dominated the Tampa Bay Rays with a 12-6 victory, led by Elly De La Cruz's 3 hits, 2 home runs, and 5 RBIs.

Several key players are dealing with injuries, including Bailey Horn, who was placed on the 60-day injured list by the Detroit Tigers due to left elbow arthroscopy recovery. The Boston Red Sox transferred Triston Casas to the 60-day injured list for recovery from left patellar tendon repair. The Houston Astros placed Taylor Trammell on the 10-day injured list with a left groin strain.

There have been several trades and roster movements in the league. The Houston Astros traded RHP Wilmy Sanchez to the New York Yankees for SS Braden Shewmake. The Los Angeles Dodgers traded RHP Axel Perez to the Baltimore Orioles for RHP Chayce McDermott. The New York Mets traded LHP Richard Lovelady to the Washington Nationals for cash. The Arizona Diamondbacks traded RHP Junior Fernández to the Milwaukee Brewers.

top_news.title: **Astros Fall to Guardians in 8-5 Loss**
top_news.summary: The Houston Astros dropped a 5-8 decision to the Cleveland Guardians, snapping their winning streak. Angel Martínez led the Guardians' offense with 2 hits, including a home run, and 1 RBI.

top_news.title: **Reds Rout Rays 12-6**
top_news.summary: The Cincinnati Reds dominated the Tampa Bay Rays, securing a 12-6 victory. Elly De La Cruz led the Reds' offense with 3 hits, 2 home runs, and 5 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Cardinals Take Down Marlins 5-3**
top_news.summary: The St. Louis Cardinals secured a 5-3 victory over the Miami Marlins, with Dustin May earning the win after 5.1 innings of work. Nathan Church led the Cardinals' offense with 2 hits, including a home run, and 2 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Brewers Blast Past Tigers 12-4**
top_news.summary: The Milwaukee Brewers secured a dominant 12-4 victory over the Detroit Tigers, with Brice Turang leading the offense with 2 hits, 4 RBIs, and 5 at-bats. Grant Anderson earned the win for the Brewers.

top_news.title: **Cardinals Fall to Marlins in 4-1 Decision**
top_news.summary: The St. Louis Cardinals suffered a 4-1 loss to the Miami Marlins in their recent matchup. Iván Herrera, Agustín Ramírez, Heriberto Hernández, and Javier Sanoja were among the impact hitters for the Cardinals.

top_news.title: **Astros Shut Out Guardians 2-0**
top_news.summary: The Houston Astros secured a 2-0 victory over the Cleveland Guardians, with Yordan Alvarez and Chase DeLauter contributing to the winning effort. Peter Lambert was instrumental in the win for the Astros.

top_news.title: **Tigers Place Bailey Horn on 60-Day Injured List**
top_news.summary: Detroit Tigers left-handed pitcher Bailey Horn has been placed on the 60-day injured list due to a left elbow arthroscopy recovery.

top_news.title: **Astros Acquire Shewmake in Trade**
top_news.summary: The Houston Astros have made a move to bolster their roster, acquiring shortstop Braden Shewmake from the New York Yankees in exchange for right-handed pitcher Wilmy Sanchez.
